title: Hiring Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres Capital India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres Capital India
jsonLd.description:
CEAT Tyres Capital India has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About CEAT Tyres Capital India:
CEAT Tyres Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres Capital India!
